Introduction to Deaf Smith County

Arrows in Deaf Smith County

Arrow #43: Hereford

More Details for Arrow #43

Coordinates: 34.8221818, -102.3963347

Installed: November 27, 2012

Marker Text:

Comanches & Kiowas hunted summer and fall in this area due to its good water, tall grass & wild game

Get Directions via Google Maps

No image available for this arrow.

Arrow #44: Hereford

More Details for Arrow #44

Coordinates: 34.8178642, -102.3975528

Installed: November 27, 2012

Marker Text:

Comanches, Kiowas & other Indians left tipi rings & arrowheads near Tierra Blanca & Palo Duro Creeks

Get Directions via Google Maps

No image available for this arrow.

Welcome to the Quanah Parker Trail!

Explore the historical arrow markers commemorating Quanah Parker and the Comanche people across the Texas Plains Trail Region. Use the map on the homepage or navigate via the menu to learn more about this effort.
